ingredients_text: Peanut Caramel 37% [Maltose Syrup, Peanut 14%, Whole Milk Powder, Vegetable Oil (Palm, Cotton, Canola, Sunflower), Sugar, Invert Sugar Syrup, Salt, Emulsifier (Sunflower Lecithin, Mono and Diglycerides of Fatty Acids), Ammonium Bicarbonate, Flavorings, Colorant (Sulfite Ammonia Caramel)], Nougat with Peanut 42% [Sugar, Maltose Syrup, Vegetable Oil (Palm, Cotton, Canola, Sunflower), Peanut 9%, Invert Sugar Syrup, Egg White Powder, Whey Powder, Whole Milk Powder, Cocoa Powder, Salt], Milk Chocolate 21% [Sugar, Cocoa Butter, Cocoa Mass, Whole Milk Powder 10%, Whey Powder, Vegetable Oil (Shea, Palm), Plain Butter, Emulsifier (Sunflower Lecithin, Polyglycerol Polyricinoleate), Flavoring (Vanillin)].
